plugin.name: Cosplay Play Assistant
plugin.description: Let a catgirl companion help you play cosplays.
entries.cosplay_get_status.name: Get cosplay plugin status
entries.cosplay_get_status.description: Return the current bridge connection status, bound game, latest error, and mode.
entries.cosplay_install_textractor.name: Install Textractor
entries.cosplay_install_textractor.descr: Detect, download, and install TextractorCLI.exe, then refresh the cosplay_plugin bridge and memory reader status.
entries.cosplay_download_rapidocr_models: Download missing model files for the current RapidOCR language and OCR version into the plugin model cache.
entries.cosplay_set_rapidocr_lang.name: Set RapidOCR language
entries.cosplay_set_rapidocr_lang.descri: Switch the RapidOCR text recognition language model and OCR version. Manual language changes disable automatic detection.
entries.cosplay_install_dxcam.name: Install DXcam
entries.cosplay_install_dxcam.descriptio: Detect and install the DXcam screenshot dependency, then refresh the cosplay_plugin OCR capture backend status.
entries.cosplay_get_snapshot.name: Get cosplay snapshot
entries.cosplay_get_snapshot.description: Return the current game snapshot and stale status.
entries.cosplay_get_history.name: Get cosplay history
entries.cosplay_get_history.description: Return recent events, stable dialogue history, and choice history.
entries.cosplay_set_mode.name: Set cosplay mode
entries.cosplay_set_mode.description: Set silent, companion, or choice_advisor mode, with optional notification updates.
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_backend.name: Set OCR / capture backend
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_backend.descript: Switch the OCR text recognition backend and screenshot backend. This only affects OCR reading and does not change Agent click safety policy.
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_timing.name: Set OCR recognition timing
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_timing.descripti: Set the OCR Reader trigger mode and polling interval. The DXcam capture backend follows OCR triggers.
entries.cosplay_set_llm_vision.name: Set LLM vision assistance
entries.cosplay_set_llm_vision.descripti: Toggle direct screenshot upload for low-confidence OCR Agent scenes and set the maximum image side length.
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_screen_templates: Save OCR screen classification templates. Templates only affect OCR Reader, not Bridge SDK or Memory Reader.
entries.cosplay_build_ocr_screen_templat: Generate an editable screen template draft from the current OCR runtime, window info, and recent recognized text.
entries.cosplay_validate_ocr_screen_temp: Replay current OCR runtime and recent text to validate screen template match results.
entries.cosplay_get_ocr_screen_awareness: Return the latest OCR screen awareness screenshot. Available only when Vision is explicitly enabled and the short-term cache has not expired.
entries.cosplay_train_ocr_screen_awarene: Train a lightweight prototype classifier from labeled JSONL samples and export a deployable JSON model.
entries.cosplay_evaluate_ocr_screen_awar: Evaluate a lightweight screen awareness model using labeled JSONL samples and optionally write an evaluation report.
entries.cosplay_bind_game.name: Bind cosplay game
entries.cosplay_bind_game.description: Bind the specified game_id. Pass an empty string to clear the manual binding and restore automatic selection.
Save or clear OCR Reader screenshot crop configuration by process name.
entries.cosplay_auto_recalibrate_ocr_dia: Automatically recalibrate the dialogue region for the currently attached OCR target window and save it for the current window resolution.
entries.cosplay_apply_recommended_ocr_ca: Apply the current OCR Reader recommended screenshot profile after user confirmation and record a rollback point.
entries.cosplay_rollback_ocr_capture_pro: Rollback the most recent OCR screenshot calibration created by applying a recommended profile.
entries.cosplay_list_memory_reader_proce: Return selectable Memory Reader processes, including exe path, detected engine, and detection reason.
entries.cosplay_set_memory_reader_target: Lock or clear the Memory Reader manual process target.
entries.cosplay_list_ocr_windows.name: List OCR candidate windows
entries.cosplay_list_ocr_windows.descrip: Return selectable windows for the current OCR Reader, optionally including the read-only exclusion list.
entries.cosplay_set_ocr_window_target.de: Lock or clear the OCR Reader manual target window.
entries.cosplay_open_ui.name: Open cosplay UI
entries.cosplay_open_ui.description: Return the access path for the cosplay_plugin static UI.
entries.cosplay_explain_line.name: Explain current or specified line
entries.cosplay_explain_line.description: Explain the current snapshot line or the line for the specified line_id.
entries.cosplay_summarize_scene.name: Summarize current scene
entries.cosplay_summarize_scene.descript: Summarize the current scene or recent story progress for the specified scene_id.
entries.cosplay_suggest_choice.name: Suggest current choice
entries.cosplay_suggest_choice.descripti: Provide recommended ranking and reasons for the currently visible choices.
entries.cosplay_agent_command.name: Send command to Game LLM Agent
entries.cosplay_agent_command.descriptio: Query Agent status, query context, send messages, or control standby.
entries.cosplay_continue_auto_advance.de: Switch to automatic advance mode and send a continue-advance message to the Game LLM Agent.
entries.cosplay_get_character_profile.de: Return a preset character profile for the specified cosplay character.
entries.cosplay_set_character_mode.name: Set character mode
entries.cosplay_set_character_mode.descr: Switch character profile mode between off and a fixed character.
entries.cosplay_get_character_list.name: List cosplay characters
entries.cosplay_get_character_list.descr: Return available preset characters for the current game.
entries.cosplay_import_character_data.de: Import a user-provided character profile JSON file.
entries.cosplay_get_scene_context.name: Get scene context
entries.cosplay_get_scene_context.descri: Return current scene summary, key lines, visible characters, and confirmed choices.
entries.cosplay_get_story_so_far.name: Get story so far
entries.cosplay_get_story_so_far.descrip: Return cross-scene memory and recent story progress.
entries.cosplay_get_recent_lines.name: Get recent lines
entries.cosplay_get_recent_lines.descrip: Return recent stable and observed dialogue lines.
entries.cosplay_get_push_history.name: Get push history
entries.cosplay_get_push_history.descrip: Return recent context push metadata without raw dialogue text.
